title: agrostis clemensiorum
intro: Agrostis clemensiorum, also known as Clemens' bentgrass or Clemens' grass, is a species of grass native to the western United States. As a plant, Agrostis clemensiorum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis clemensiorum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, which can lead to relief from symptoms associated with conditions such as eczema and acne. Agrostis clemensiorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and promote wound healing.
